normalization.timingNormalizationNote: Strict Dawn-vs-Doe operation comparability uses direct timing (baseline/comparison divisors fixed to 1.0).

workload.comparabilityNotes: Doe dispatches pre-compiled MSL; Dawn routes through Tint->MSL. Both sides execute the same non-atomic workgroup reduction logic.
workload.description: Non-atomic workgroup compute kernel with 1024 workgroups, 100 dispatches per step, matching Dawn WorkgroupAtomicPerf non-atomic variant.
workload.name: workgroup-non-atomic 1024
